steps.name: hierarchical-layers-panel
steps.summary: apps/agent-design/src/LayersPanel.tsx renders the canonical hierarchy as an ARIA tree projection (no second store): expand/collapse UI state only, selection via select-nodes, rename/visibility/lock via update-node, reorder via planSiblingReorder->reorder-node, reparent via planNodeDrop('inside')->reparent-node with active/invalid drop feedback; drag id tracked in a ref (dataTransfer.getData is drop-only in real browsers, same pattern as CanvasSurface). App.tsx replaced the Layers Soon rail placeholder with the panel wired to commit(). Verified: LayersPanel.test.tsx 8 tests (tree semantics, expand/collapse, tree<->document selection sync with ancestor auto-reveal, keyboard traversal, inline rename with focus restore, visibility/lock, boundary/locked reorder rejection, valid/invalid/locked drops), App.test.tsx +1 canvas<->tree sync test; suite 28/28 PASS, tsc+vite build PASS, browser smoke tmp/ux2-step2-layers-smoke.png.

steps.name: searchable-insert-palette
steps.summary: packages/canvas-core/src/commands.ts gained createInstanceNode (known code-components only, throws otherwise), resolveInsertParent (single unlocked frame/group/code-component selection else canvas root), planInsertBounds (root 40,40; container parent origin +24,+24), and planInsert (batch create-node+select-nodes = one history entry, single Undo restores prior selection). apps/agent-design/src/InsertPalette.tsx renders search + Primitives(Frame/Text/Group; sizes 240x160/120x32/200x140)/Components(document code-components as instances) with empty state and role=status insertion feedback naming the target parent. App.tsx toolbar Insert button (data-testid toggle-insert) toggles the palette as a canvas-stage overlay wired to commit(). Verified: core 43/43 (4 new planner tests), app 35/35 (InsertPalette.test.tsx 6 tests + App insert-undo integration test), tsc+vite build PASS, browser smoke tmp/ux2-step3-insert-smoke.png. No npm browsing/import — document-known metadata only.

steps.name: layout-arrangement-controls
steps.summary: packages/canvas-core: planTidyGap (exact cursor-chain spacing, locked/min-count reject), planGroupSelection (same-parent guard, union bounds, batch create+reparent+select = one history entry, id prefix grouped-), planUngroup (children back to parent at group index in order, delete group, select children, locked-children reject); properties.ts layout scope gained gap+padding fields (padding uniform [v,v,v,v], readNodeProperty returns padding[0] so set-node-property inversion works; validation rejects negative/non-number) and propertyFieldsForNode now emits layout.gap/layout.padding so PropertyInspector renders them without changes. apps/agent-design/src/ArrangementToolbar.tsx (in document-actions nav) exposes 6 align + 2 distribute + tidy(16px) + group/ungroup with selection-aware disabled states (count, locked, same-parent, group-kind). Verified: core 47/47 (3 new command tests + padding/gap property test), app 39/39 (ArrangementToolbar.test.tsx 4 tests: disabled matrix, align exact bounds+undo, tidy exact spacing, group/ungroup roundtrip), tsc+vite build PASS, browser smoke tmp/ux2-step4-arrange-smoke.png (shift multi-select + align left, revision 3). Responsive constraints untouched — align/tidy only write bounds via transform-nodes.
